title: Me after watching Bugonia
prompt_text: A surreal and comedic indoor scene set in a domestic bathroom. A tabby and white cat is standing on its hind legs on a bathroom counter in front of a large mirror. The cat appears to have a perfectly smooth, pink bald head, as if it has been shaved. It is holding a pair of silver electric hair clippers with its paws. The sink and counter are covered in clumps of brown cat fur, suggesting a recent grooming session. The background shows a tiled shower wall and a glass shower door, with warm, indoor lighting casting soft shadows.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A surreal and comedic indoor scene set in a domestic bathroom. A tabby and white cat is standing on its hind legs on a bathroom counter in front of a large mirror. The cat appears to have a perfectly smooth, pink bald head, as if it has been shaved. It is holding a pair of silver electric hair clippers with its paws. The sink and counter are covered in clumps of brown cat fur, suggesting a recent grooming session. The background shows a tiled shower wall and a glass shower door, with warm, indoor lighting casting soft shadows.

cinematography.cameraShot: The video starts with a medium shot from a side angle, showing the cat's profile and its reflection in the mirror. The camera then pans and zooms in to a close-up frontal shot of the cat's face.

actions: The cat stands still, looking at its reflection in the mirror while holding the clippers.
The camera pans to face the cat directly.
The cat looks directly into the camera lens with a serious expression.
The cat opens its mouth and lets out a short, sharp 'meow' in response to an off-camera voice.
The cat continues to stare at the camera with a grumpy or stoic expression.
dialogue: A female voice off-camera asks: 'What'd you do, buddy?'
The cat responds with a vocalization: 'Meow!'
[Sound of electric clippers buzzing faintly in the background]
